proposal_intro_text.value: This is to submit our cost proposal for the above project amounting to:

proposal_amount_text.value: NINETY-NINE MILLION, EIGHT HUNDRED TWENTY-EIGHT THOUSAND, ONE HUNDRED SEVENTY-SEVEN AND 16/100 ONLY. (Php 99,828,177.16) (VAT EXCLUSIVE).

proposal_background_text.value: This project proposal was prepared based on the discussions with CBMS. The scope of work and corresponding cost estimates are based on the information provided during the consultation and the plans given.

proposal_validity_text.value: This proposal is valid until March 31, 2026. Attached herewith is the detailed estimate of the project. Should you find any items for clarifications, please do not hesitate to contact us.

proposal_inclusion_2.value: All labor, materials, equipment, and tools

proposal_inclusion_3.value: All architectural, structural, civil, and MEPF works

proposal_exclusion_3.value: Any scope not included in PMFTC's General Specifications

proposal_exclusion_4.value: Permit Processing Representation Expenses and Payment

proposal_understanding_intro.value: Based on PMFTC's General Specifications, the project includes:

proposal_panel_1_item_2.value: Tempered bronze glass windows, acoustic ceilings

proposal_panel_1_item_3.value: Pantry with cabinets, sink, exhaust fan

proposal_panel_1_item_4.value: Comfort rooms with HCG/American Standard fixtures

proposal_panel_title_2.style: height: 21px; font-family: "Times New Roman", serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.35; text-align: left; text-transform: none; letter-spacing: 0px; color: rgb(17, 17, 17);

proposal_panel_2_item_4.value: Motorized roll-up door, fire exit door

proposal_panel_title_3.style: height: 21px; font-family: "Times New Roman", serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.35; text-align: left; text-transform: none; letter-spacing: 0px; color: rgb(17, 17, 17);

proposal_panel_3_item_1.value: CHB perimeter fence with concertina wire

proposal_charter_objective_4.value: Turn over a fully functional facility with as-built documentation

proposal_assumption_2.value: Site access is granted upon award

proposal_assumption_4.value: Ground Stability and Soil Condition Assumptions

proposal_assumption_note_1.value: The Contractor assumes that the existing filled earth within the project site, including the newly constructed slope protection structures along the perimeter where the CHB fence will be erected, is stable, properly compacted, and structurally adequate to support all proposed works.
proposal_assumption_note_1.style: height: 62px; font-family: "Times New Roman", serif; font-weight: 700; text-align: justify; font-size: 0.95rem !important; line-height: 1.35 !important; text-transform: none !important; letter-spacing: 0px !important; color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; margin-top: 0px !important; margin-bottom: 0.08in !important; padding: 0px !important; background-color: transparent !important; position: relative !important; left: 10mm !important; margin-left: 0px !important;

proposal_assumption_note_2.value: The Contractor's ground improvement scope is limited to the compaction of exposed grade on open areas, defined as:
proposal_assumption_note_2.style: height: 41px; font-weight: 400; text-align: left; font-size: 0.95rem !important; font-family: "Times New Roman", serif !important; line-height: 1.35 !important; text-transform: none !important; letter-spacing: 0px !important; color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; margin-top: 0px !important; margin-bottom: 0.08in !important; padding: 0px !important; background-color: transparent !important; position: relative !important; left: 10mm !important; margin-left: 0px !important;

proposal_assumption_subitem_a.value: Scraping/excavating the top 0.30 m of soil and compacting the material in 0.15 m lifts to achieve the required density.

proposal_assumption_subitem_b.value: Any soil condition beyond 0.30 m depth is assumed to be stable and suitable for construction. No ground improvement, soil stabilization, or structural reinforcement below this depth is included in the Contract Price.

proposal_foundation_heading.value: Warehouse Foundation Depth and Soil Stability Assumptions
proposal_foundation_heading.style: height: 21px; text-align: left; font-family: "Times New Roman", serif !important; font-size: 0.95rem !important; font-weight: 700 !important; line-height: 1.35 !important; text-transform: none !important; letter-spacing: 0px !important; color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; margin-top: 0px !important; margin-bottom: 0.08in !important; padding: 0px !important; background-color: transparent !important; position: relative !important; left: 10mm !important; margin-left: 0px !important;

proposal_foundation_subitem_c.value: The Contractor assumes that the natural ground conditions beneath the warehouse building are suitable for foundation construction up to a maximum depth of 4.0 meters from the existing surface elevation. The Contractor's pricing and structural design are based on the assumption that no foundation element will require excavation or installation deeper than 4.0 meters.

proposal_foundation_subitem_d.value: The Contractor guarantees the stability and performance of the warehouse foundation system only within this assumed 4.0-meter depth, provided that the soil conditions encountered are consistent with typical bearing capacities for commercial warehouse structures.

proposal_foundation_subitem_e.value: If soil conditions below 4.0 meters are found to be unstable, unsuitable, or incapable of supporting the designed loads, any required corrective works, such as deeper excavation, soil replacement, ground improvement, or redesign, shall be treated as additional work.

proposal_foundation_subitem_f.value: This assumption is in addition to the Contractor's included ground-improvement scope, which is limited to scraping the exposed grade to a depth of 0.30 meters and compacting the material in 0.15-meter lifts. Any soil condition beyond 0.30 meters is assumed to be stable unless proven otherwise during construction.

proposal_fixed_d_duration.style: font-family: "Times New Roman", serif !important; font-size: 0.95rem !important; font-weight: 700 !important; line-height: 1.35 !important; text-align: left; text-transform: none !important; letter-spacing: 0px !important; color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; margin-top: 0px !important; margin-bottom: 10.26px !important; padding: 0px !important; background-color: transparent !important; position: relative !important; left: 0px !important; margin-left: 0px !important;

proposal_duration_text.value: 300 working days upon awarding of the project and issuance of Notice to Proceed.

proposal_fixed_f_price_escalation_and_ch.value: F. Price Escalation and Change Order

proposal_fixed_a_price_escalation_due_to.value: a. Price Escalation Due to Material and Fuel Cost Increases
proposal_fixed_a_price_escalation_due_to.style: font-family: "Times New Roman", serif !important; font-size: 0.95rem !important; font-weight: 700 !important; line-height: 1.35 !important; text-align: left; text-transform: none !important; letter-spacing: 0px !important; color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; margin-top: 0px !important; margin-bottom: 0.08in !important; padding: 0px !important; background-color: transparent !important; position: relative !important; left: 5mm !important; margin-left: 0px !important;

proposal_escalation_clause_1.value: If, during project execution, the market cost of construction materials, fuel, oil, logistics, or related services increases by more than five percent (5%) compared to the baseline prices used in the Contractor's approved bid amount of (Php 99,828,177.16), the Contractor shall be entitled to a price adjustment.
proposal_escalation_clause_1.style: height: 62px; font-family: "Times New Roman", serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.35; text-align: left; text-transform: none; letter-spacing: 0px; color: rgb(17, 17, 17);

proposal_fixed_basis_of_escalation.style: font-family: "Times New Roman", serif !important; font-size: 0.95rem !important; font-weight: 700 !important; line-height: 1.35 !important; text-align: left; text-transform: none !important; letter-spacing: 0px !important; color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; margin-top: 0px !important; margin-bottom: 0.08in !important; padding: 0px !important; background-color: transparent !important; position: relative !important; left: 10mm !important; margin-left: 0px !important;

proposal_escalation_basis.value: Escalation applies when official price indices from PSA, DOE, or recognized suppliers show increases and the increase materially affects the cost of delivering the works. The Contractor absorbs the first 5% increase. Any increase beyond 5% shall be charged to the Client.
proposal_escalation_basis.style: height: 59px; font-family: "Times New Roman", serif; font-size: 11pt; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.35; text-align: left; text-transform: none; letter-spacing: 0px; color: rgb(17, 17, 17);

proposal_formula_text.value: Computation: Escalation Amount = (Actual Cost Increase - 5%) x Affected Work Value
proposal_formula_text.style: height: 21px; font-family: "Times New Roman", serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.35; text-align: left; text-transform: none; letter-spacing: 0px; color: rgb(17, 17, 17);

proposal_fixed_b_notification_and_docume.style: font-family: "Times New Roman", serif !important; font-size: 0.95rem !important; font-weight: 700 !important; line-height: 1.35 !important; text-align: left; text-transform: none !important; letter-spacing: 0px !important; color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; margin-top: 0px !important; margin-bottom: 0.08in !important; padding: 0px !important; background-color: transparent !important; position: relative !important; left: 5mm !important; margin-left: 0px !important;

proposal_notification_documentation.value: The Contractor shall notify the Client within 15 days of identifying the increase and submit supplier quotations, PSA/DOE bulletins, and updated cost breakdowns. The Client shall evaluate and approve escalation claims within 15 days. Payment shall be made via Variation Order or Contract Price Adjustment.
proposal_notification_documentation.style: height: 62px; font-family: "Times New Roman", serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.35; text-align: left; text-transform: none; letter-spacing: 0px; color: rgb(17, 17, 17);

proposal_fixed_c_change_order.style: font-family: "Times New Roman", serif !important; font-size: 0.95rem !important; font-weight: 700 !important; line-height: 1.35 !important; text-align: left; text-transform: none !important; letter-spacing: 0px !important; color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; margin-top: 0px !important; margin-bottom: 0.08in !important; padding: 0px !important; background-color: transparent !important; position: relative !important; left: 5mm !important; margin-left: 0px !important;

proposal_change_order_text.value: Any changes to the scope of work must be documented through a written Change Order approved by both the Owner and Contractor. The Change Order shall describe the modification and any adjustment to the contract price or project schedule. No work related to the change shall proceed without written approval.
